subject: maths
name: Polynomials
intro: Is chapter mein hum polynomials ke zeroes ka geometrical meaning samjhenge — y = p(x) ka graph x-axis ko kahan kaatta hai. Phir quadratic aur cubic polynomial ke zeroes aur coefficients ke beech ka relationship dekhenge. Yeh formulas board mein zaroor aate hain!

topics.name: Polynomials — Types aur Zeroes
topics.desc: Linear, quadratic, cubic pehchano. Zero kya hota hai?

steps.title: Raju Ki Pocket Money Formula! 💰
steps.body:
Raju ke papa ka formula: 'Tere marks ka square ÷ 10 minus 5 rupaye'

Agar marks = x ho toh pocket money = x²/10 – 5

Yeh ek QUADRATIC POLYNOMIAL hai — degree 2 mein!

Maths mein aisa expression jisme variable ki sirf positive integer powers hon — woh POLYNOMIAL hai. Degree = sabse badi power.

steps.title: Polynomial ke Types — Degree se Pehchano
steps.body:
**Degree 1 → LINEAR Polynomial**
General form: ax + b (a ≠ 0)
Examples: 2x – 3, √3x + 5, y + √2, u/3 – 1

**Degree 2 → QUADRATIC Polynomial**
General form: ax² + bx + c (a ≠ 0)
Examples: 2x² + 3x – 2/5, y² – 2, 2 – x + √2x²

**Degree 3 → CUBIC Polynomial**
General form: ax³ + bx² + cx + d (a ≠ 0)
Examples: 2 – x³, x³, 3x³ – 2x² + x – 1

❌ POLYNOMIAL NAHI hain:
• 1/(x+1) — variable denominator mein
• √x + 2 — fractional power
• x⁻² + 3 — negative power

steps.title: Zero of a Polynomial
steps.note:
Real number k ek zero hai agar p(k) = 0 ho.

Example: p(x) = x² – 3x – 4
p(–1) = (–1)² – 3(–1) – 4 = 1 + 3 – 4 = 0  ✅
p(4) = 16 – 12 – 4 = 0  ✅
Isliye –1 aur 4 dono zeroes hain!

Linear polynomial ax + b ka zero:
p(k) = 0 → ak + b = 0 → k = –b/a

steps.title: p(x) = x² – 3x – 4 ke zeroes check karo
steps.question: Check karo ki –1 aur 4 polynomial p(x) = x² – 3x – 4 ke zeroes hain.

questions.question: p(x) = x² + 7x + 10 ke zeroes check karo: x = –2 aur x = –5
Linear polynomial 3x – 5 ka zero nikalo
4s² – 4s + 1 ke zeroes nikalo (factorisation se)

steps.title: Key Points — Yaad Rakhna! 🧠
points: Zero = woh real number k jahan p(k) = 0
Linear polynomial ax + b ka zero = –b/a
Degree n ka polynomial → atmost n zeroes
Quadratic → atmost 2 zeroes, Cubic → atmost 3 zeroes

topics.name: Geometrical Meaning of Zeroes
topics.desc: Graph aur x-axis — parabola ke 3 cases

steps.title: Graph Ki Kahani — Zeroes Dikhte Hain! 🎯
steps.body:
Jab hum y = p(x) ka graph draw karte hain — jahan bhi yeh curve x-axis ko KAATTA hai (yahan y = 0 hota hai) — wahan ka x-value ek ZERO hai!

Linear y = ax + b → Ek seedhi line → Exactly 1 zero
Quadratic y = ax² + bx + c → Parabola (U shape ya ∩ shape) → 0, 1, ya 2 zeroes
Cubic y = ax³ + bx² + cx + d → S-shaped curve → atmost 3 zeroes

Yeh NCERT ka sabse important geometrical connection hai!

steps.title: Linear Polynomial — Straight Line Graph
steps.intro: y = ax + b ka graph ek seedhi line hoti hai. Slider chalao aur dekho zero kaise change hota hai!

steps.title: Quadratic Polynomial — Parabola ke 3 Cases
steps.body:
y = ax² + bx + c → PARABOLA
• a > 0 → ∪ shape (upward)
• a < 0 → ∩ shape (downward)

**Case 1:** Parabola x-axis ko 2 distinct points A, A' par kaate
→ 2 DISTINCT zeroes

**Case 2:** Parabola x-axis ko exactly 1 point par chhuye (tangent)
→ 2 EQUAL zeroes (repeated)

**Case 3:** Parabola x-axis ko KABHI nahi kaate
→ NO real zeroes

**Rule: Quadratic mein ATMOST 2 zeroes!**

steps.title: y = x² – 3x – 4 — Parabola aur Table (NCERT Fig 2.2)
steps.intro: NCERT ka exact example! Table mein dekho kahan y = 0 hai — wahi zeroes hain.

steps.title: Parabola ke Teen Cases — Interactive (NCERT Fig 2.3, 2.4, 2.5)
steps.intro: Buttons dabao aur teeno cases dekho — 2 zeroes, 1 zero, ya 0 zeroes!

steps.title: Cubic Polynomial — S-Shaped Curve (NCERT Fig 2.6)
steps.intro: y = x³ – 4x ka graph. Dekho kahan-kahan x-axis ko kaatta hai — 3 zeroes!

questions.question: Ek parabola x-axis ko sirf touch kare (tangent) — kitne zeroes hain?
questions.answer: 1 zero (repeated). Case 2 hai. Dono zeroes equal hain. Ek hi value leti hai.

questions.question: Ek curve (cubic) x-axis ko 3 points par kaate — minimum degree kya ho sakta hai?
questions.answer: Minimum degree 3 (cubic polynomial). Degree n → atmost n zeroes. 3 zeroes ke liye degree ≥ 3.

questions.question: Parabola completely x-axis ke upar hai — zeroes kitne hain?
questions.answer: 0 zeroes! Case 3. No real roots. D = b² – 4ac < 0 hoga.

steps.title: Geometrical Meaning Summary 🎯
points: Zeroes = x-coordinates of points jahan graph x-axis kaatta hai
Degree n → at most n zeroes (general rule)

topics.name: Zeroes aur Coefficients ka Relationship
topics.desc: α+β = –b/a aur αβ = c/a — NCERT ka most important result!

steps.title: Zeroes Aur Coefficients Ka Secret Connection! 🔗
steps.body:
NCERT ne ek magical connection dhundha — quadratic polynomial ke zeroes aur uske coefficients directly related hote hain!

p(x) = 2x² – 8x + 6 ke zeroes 1 aur 3 hain.
Zeroes ka sum = 1 + 3 = 4 = –(–8)/2 = –b/a ✅
Zeroes ka product = 1 × 3 = 3 = 6/2 = c/a ✅

Yeh coincidence nahi — hamesha yahi hota hai!

steps.title: Quadratic Polynomial ke Zeroes ke Formulas
steps.note:
p(x) = ax² + bx + c ke zeroes α aur β hain:

Sum of zeroes:
α + β = –b/a = –(coefficient of x) / (coefficient of x²)

Product of zeroes:
α × β = c/a = constant term / coefficient of x²

Derivation:
ax² + bx + c = k(x–α)(x–β) = k[x² – (α+β)x + αβ]
Compare: b = –k(α+β), c = kαβ, a = k
→ α+β = –b/a, αβ = c/a ✅

steps.title: NCERT Example 2: x² + 7x + 10 ke zeroes
steps.question: x² + 7x + 10 ke zeroes nikalo aur relationship verify karo.

steps.title: NCERT Example 3: x² – 3 ke zeroes
steps.question: x² – 3 ke zeroes nikalo aur relationship verify karo.

steps.title: NCERT Example 4: Quadratic Polynomial Banao
steps.question: Ek quadratic polynomial banao jiske zeroes ka sum –3 aur product 2 ho.

steps.title: Cubic Polynomial ke Zeroes ke Relations
steps.note:
p(x) = ax³ + bx² + cx + d ke zeroes α, β, γ hain:

Sum: α + β + γ = –b/a
Sum of products (pairs): αβ + βγ + γα = c/a
Product: αβγ = –d/a

NCERT Example 5: p(x) = 2x³ – 5x² – 14x + 8
Zeroes: 4, –2, 1/2
Sum = 4+(–2)+1/2 = 5/2 = –(–5)/2 = –b/a ✅
Product = 4×(–2)×(1/2) = –4 = –8/2 = –d/a ✅

steps.title: NCERT Example 5 (Cubic Verification)
steps.question: Verify karo ki 3, –1, –1/3 polynomial p(x) = 3x³ – 5x² – 11x – 3 ke zeroes hain.

questions.question: x² – 2x – 8 ke zeroes nikalo aur verify karo
6x² – 3 – 7x ke zeroes nikalo
Sum = 1/4, Product = –1 wala quadratic polynomial banao
questions.answer: x² – (sum)x + product = x² – (1/4)x – 1 = 0. Multiply by 4: 4x² – x – 4

questions.question: Sum = √2, Product = 1/3 wala polynomial banao

steps.title: Board Exam ke Important Formulas! 🏆
points: Verify karna: calculate karo aur formula se match karo
a=1 le sakte ho polynomial banate waqt — simpler hota hai

questions.question: p(x) = x² – 3x – 4 mein p(–1) kya hai?
questions.explanation: (–1)² = 1, –3×(–1) = +3, then –4. Total = 1+3–4 = 0. Isliye –1 ek zero hai!

questions.question: ax² + bx + c mein zeroes ka sum kya hai?
questions.hint: Formula: α + β = –(coefficient of x) / (coefficient of x²)
questions.explanation: NCERT result: α + β = –b/a. Yaad karo: sum = NEGATIVE of b/a.

questions.question: ax² + bx + c mein zeroes ka product kya hai?
questions.hint: Formula: αβ = constant term / leading coefficient
questions.explanation: NCERT result: αβ = c/a. Product = positive c/a (no negative sign!)

questions.question: 2x² – 8x + 6 ke zeroes hain:
Ek quadratic polynomial ka graph x-axis ko sirf ek point par touch karta hai. Zeroes kitne hain?
questions.explanation: Case 2: graph x-axis ko exactly ek point par chhuye → 2 equal zeroes (repeated). Ek hi value hai.

questions.question: x² + 7x + 10 ke zeroes hain:
3x² + 5x – 2 ke zeroes hain:
Sum = 0, Product = –√5 wala quadratic polynomial kaunsa hai?
questions.explanation: x² – 0x + (–√5) = x² – √5. Verify: zeroes √5 aur –√5. Sum=0 ✅, Product=–√5 ✅

questions.question: 4u² + 8u ke zeroes hain:
questions.explanation: 4u²+8u = 4u(u+2). Zeroes: u=0 ya u=–2. Sum=–2=–8/4 ✅, Product=0=0/4 ✅

questions.question: Cubic polynomial 2x³ – 5x² – 14x + 8 mein zeroes 4, –2, 1/2 hain. Product kya hai?
p(x) = x³ – 4x ke zeroes hain: –2, 0, 2. Sum of products (pairs) kya hai?
Ek quadratic polynomial ke zeroes 2+√3 aur 2–√3 hain. Polynomial kya hai?
questions.explanation: Sum=4, Product=1. Polynomial: x²–4x+1. Verify: D=16–4=12>0. Zeroes=2±√3 ✅

questions.question: p(x) = kx² + 2x + 3k mein zeroes ka sum = product. k kya hai?
Exercise 2.2 (vi): Sum = 4, Product = 1 wala quadratic polynomial:
p(x) = 2x³ – 5x² – 14x + 8 mein α+β+γ kya hai?
